import React from 'react'
  import { MDXTag } from '@mdx-js/tag'
  import {Playground} from "docz";
import {FormConfig, Form, Field} from "./Form/index.js";

const layoutProps = {
  
};
export default class MDXContent extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props)
    this.layout = null
  }
  render() {
    const { components, ...props } = this.props

    return <MDXTag
             name="wrapper"
             
             components={components}><MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"form"}}>{`Form`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`A proxy from Formik `}<MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="em">{`Form`}</MDXTag></MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"field"}}>{`Field`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`A Field for Form`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h2" components={components} props={{"id":"props"}}>{`Props`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`Extends Formik `}<MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="em">{`FormConfig`}</MDXTag></MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="table" components={components}>
<MDXTag name="thead" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="thead">
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Name`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Type`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Default`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Description`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tbody" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`label`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`string`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Label for the item`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`name`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`string`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Name of the property that should be mapped to the input`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`children`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`Element<Input>`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Input type element`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h1" components={components} props={{"id":"formconfig"}}>{`FormConfig`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`A proxy from Formik `}<MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="em">{`FormConfig`}</MDXTag></MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h2" components={components} props={{"id":"props-1"}}>{`Props`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="p" components={components}><MDXTag name="em" components={components} parentName="p">{`Extends Formik `}<MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="em">{`FormConfig`}</MDXTag></MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="table" components={components}>
<MDXTag name="thead" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="thead">
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Name`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Type`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Default`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="th" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Description`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tbody" components={components} parentName="table">
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`initialValues`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`?Values`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Initial values for the form`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`onSubmit`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`(Values, FormikBag) => void`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Function to be called on submit`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="tr" components={components} parentName="tbody">
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`children`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}><MDXTag name="inlineCode" components={components} parentName="td">{`formikBag => Element`}</MDXTag></MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`-`}</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="td" components={components} parentName="tr" props={{"align":null}}>{`Content of the form`}</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
</MDXTag>
<MDXTag name="h2" components={components} props={{"id":"usage"}}>{`Usage`}</MDXTag>


<Playground __position={0} __code={'<FormConfig initialValues={{ name: \'Gonzalo\' }} onSubmit={console.log}>\n  {({ isValid, handleSubmit }) => (\n    <Form>\n      <Field name=\"name\">\n   <FormConfig
    initialValues={{name: 'Gonzalo'}}
    onSubmit={console.log}
  >
    {({ isValid, handleSubmit }) => (
      <Form>
        <Field name="name">
          <input type="text"/>
        </Field>
        <button type="submit">Submit</button>
      </Form>
    )}
  </FormConfig>
</Playground>
           </MDXTag>
  }
}
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true
